ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size entry */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label indicating the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "sizing_standard" TEXT /* Sizing standard (e.g., EU, US) */,
  "eu_size" INTEGER /* EU standard size designation */,
  "neck_eu" TEXT /* Neck measurement in EU size */,
  "neck_us" TEXT /* Neck measurement in US size */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement */,
  "arm" TEXT /* Arm measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category to which the product belongs (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product (e.g., casual, formal) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Target gender for the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-size association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size available for the product */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Count of items available in this size */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management */,
  "size_chart" TEXT /* Reference to the size chart used for this product-size combination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, designer, inventory manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each size entry
Label indicating the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L)
Category to which the product belongs (e.g., shirts, pants)
Style of the product (e.g., casual, formal)

Count of items available in this size

Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, designer, inventory manager)

Timestamp for when the user details were last updated
